description:
Banks also offer group health insurance to their account holders, borrowers, and depositors as per the bank's policy. 

There are many private as well as public sector banks that offer group insurance plans to their account holders. But which one is the best for you ? Personal Individual Health Insurance or Health Insurance by Banks (BANK HEALTH INSURANCE)

✅  To buy insurance policies, click here - https://hareepatti.com/contact-us/ 
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
For any queries:
📲 WhatsApp : https://wa.me/message/VJCYEKX3EWHOE1
📞 Call : 9650706699
💌  Mail us at: info@hareepatti.com

✅ TIME STAMPS
0:00  Introduction
0:49  Health Insurance from Banks
3:12  Advantages of Bank Health Insurance
4:11  Disadvantages of Bank Health Insurance
5:46  Bank Health Insurance Portability
6:41  No Riders in Bank Health Insurance
6:59  No Customer Support from Bank
7:28  My Opinion on Bank Health Policy
8:58  Conclusion

comments.text:
1)Health Insurance permanent Nahin rahata 
2)pahle hi Soch samajhkar policy lena bad Mein port karne ka Kam Nahin Padega
3) Bank ka insurance support Bhi Milega vahan Ek aadami baithata Hai insurance ka kam dekhne wala
4)koi bhi company lifetime permanent cover nahin karti Har Sal ya 3 Sal Mein Ek Bar usko renew kar raha hi padta hai
5)Bank Jiske Sath type kar lega uska premium bhi retail policy se kam hi hoga
6)Maharashtra Bank ka Manipal Singh na se type hai Kuchh Bade Branch mein ek aadami bhi is kam Ke Liye baithata Hai Uska Bhi support aapko Milta Hai
7)bahut hi kam premium  Hota Hai family ke Aur Bhi member add Ho Jaati Hai 
8) aapke premium Mein dugne Se Bhi Jyada Fark girega Agar Tally karna hai to Bank of Maharashtra Manipal Singh na Pro Health Insurance se aap kar sakte hain vah karne ke bad ya comment Karen
9)Kisi bhi Bank ka Health Insurance aur private company ka Health Insurance donon ki premium ka video banaaiye 
thank you
comments.author: @jayantraut4623

So better one should not go for bank's medical insurance.

comments.text:
Thanks  for your  kind information. 
My advice  to the general public is never  buy health insurance policy through  bank.  
This is daylight  robbery  by the  insurance company  and  the  Bank. There is no way you can  get  your  claim if you  have pre existing  disease   Please  read the  fine print in the  T & C    waiting period is  3 years  by the time  you  complete  3 years  the  contract  between the bank  and  insurance company  is terminated  and  now  new insurance company  is  introduced  in the end of the day  you will  find  you are robbed  by the  bank.

I  am a Bank of India  customer  from  2011 for 9 years i bought  national insurance company  policy  no claim done in 2020  i was informed  that  contract  with  national  insurance company  has been  terminated now buy new policy through  Reliance  general  insurance company  after paying for  3 years  now  again same old story  asked to  buy from  star health insurance company.  

These  are  our white  collared  thieves  they play with your lives.

I have even  written  to The PM  and IRDA but no  reply,  looks like all  are  in the loop.

The Star health insurance  add  mentions  Rs73/= per day premium  for senior citizen  5lakh sum assured  but when you contact them  it is a different story.
comments.author: @allenpic

comments.text:
One thing to be noted : health insurance is also not a long term contract between customer and insurance company even if the company can change your policy  condition (irda approval needed) and premium also changes as per age and conditions. Even a  person cannot buy  health insurance for their whole life in a single premium like in life insurance person can buy policy for lifetime with single premium.

So please consider these points as well I suggest corporate policy from an employer is the best  option before 55 years of age or you don't have any medical issues. And side by side create 5-10 lakh medical corpus. 

Because in India health insurance claims are not settled properly even if you file a complaint with irdai it will not get resolved even bima bharosa cell also mentioned that they can guide the insurance company to settle claims but cannot order for claim decision so please make sure.
comments.author: @nikhilpurohit816
